summary: Completed testing of 4 new features for MEDVET INTEGRATIVA: (1) Homepage therapies showcase replacing featured products, (2) Sidebar menu with 11 treatment categories, (3) Products by Segment page (/loja), (4) Dietary Therapy page (/terapia-alimentar) with 8 new products. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with featured-therapies section (data-testid='featured-therapies')
Homepage shows 'Terapias Clássicas' section with Acupuntura, Fitoterapia, Ozonioterapia, Homeopatia, Reiki, Terapia Canábica
Homepage shows 'Terapias Físicas e Manuais' section
Homepage shows 'Nutrição e Bem-estar' section
Homepage shows 'Terapias Biológicas' section
Sidebar menu opens when clicking hamburger icon (data-testid='sidebar-trigger')
Sidebar shows all 11 menu items including 'Terapia Alimentar'
Sidebar closes on backdrop click
Sidebar closes on X button click (data-testid='sidebar-close-btn')
Header nav 'Produtos' links to /loja
Products by Segment page (/loja) loads with data-testid='product-segments-page'
/loja shows all 8 segments: acupuntura, homeopatia, cbd, hormonios, medicina-chinesa, saude-pelos, cromoterapia, terapia-alimentar
Dietary Therapy page (/terapia-alimentar) loads with data-testid='dietary-therapy-page'
/terapia-alimentar shows cetogenic diet section (#cetogenica)
/terapia-alimentar shows natural diet section (#natural)
/terapia-alimentar shows functional nutrition section (#funcional)
/terapia-alimentar shows 8 product cards from terapia-alimentar category
GET /api/products?category=terapia-alimentar returns 8 products
GET /api/categories returns 'Terapia Alimentar' category (9 total categories)
No JavaScript errors on any page
seed_data_creation: 8 new products for terapia-alimentar category (ali-001 through ali-008) already seeded in backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: (1) Homepage now shows therapies showcase instead of featured products - organized by category (Terapias Clássicas, Físicas e Manuais, Nutrição e Bem-estar, Biológicas). (2) Sidebar menu with 11 items slides in from left with z-[80] stacking. (3) /loja page shows products grouped by 8 treatment segments. (4) /terapia-alimentar page has cetogenic, natural, and functional diet content with 8 products. All routes working: /, /loja, /terapia-alimentar.
